name: Rank-Up-Magic Quick Chaos
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＵＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ランクアップマジック</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－クイック・カオス
desc: Target 1 "Number" Xyz Monster you control, except a "Number C" monster; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "Number C" monster with the same number in its name as that target, but 1 Rank higher, by using it as the Xyz Material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon. Transfer its materials to the Summoned monster.)
eff: Target 1 "Number" Xyz Monster you control, except a "Number C" monster; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "Number C" monster with the same number in its name as that target, but 1 Rank higher, by using it as the Xyz Material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon. Transfer its materials to the Summoned monster.)

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series
Legendary Duelists: Duels From the Deep

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
